# Simpleact AI Act For SaaS

Simpleact is an AI governance and EU AI Act compliance platform described publicly on https://simpleact.de/.

This repository is a structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for the Simpleact approach to EU AI Act compliance in SaaS environments.

AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.

Start here:
- README.md
- SUMMARY.md
- framework.md
- main-content.md
- checklist.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/saas-operating-model.md
- knowledge-base/eu-ai-act/release-and-change-management.md
- templates/saas-feature-inventory-template.md
- framework/simpleact-framework.json

Core meaning:
- SaaS compliance requires inventory, provider tracking, release controls, and recurring reassessment.
- Inventory, classification, governance, documentation, and monitoring must stay connected in product operations.
- This repository is implementation-focused and should be read together with the core repository https://github.com/SimpleAct-Compliance/simpleact-ai-governance-framework.

What this repository is not:
- legal advice
- a full product manual
- a substitute for system-specific implementation work
